creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Round 1 changes, DA refers to the Default Assignee:

- Add Product: Community
   - Add IRC - DA: irc@
   
- Create Accounts (managed bug bugmeister, disabled for login)
   - git-admin@FreeBSD.org
   - phabric-admin@FreeBSD.org
   - irc@FreeBSD.org
   
Base System
 - Description updated
 
Services (Product)
 - Add Wiki            - DA: clusteradm@
 - Add Portsnap        - DA: cperciva@ CC: clusteradm@
 - Add Portsmon        - DA: linimon@ CC: droso@
 - Add Testing & CI    - DA: jenkins-admin@
 - Add Git Integration - DA: git-admin@
 - Add FreeBSD Update  - DA: secteam@
 - Add Code Review     - DA: phabric-admin@
 
Ports & Packages
 - Renamed: Infrastructure (Component) to "Ports Framework"
 - Add Default CC: portmgr@freebsd.org
 - Add "Package Infrastructure" DA: portmgr@
 
Ports Tree (Product)
 - Renamed: Ports & Packages
 - Description updated
 
Supporting Services (Product)
 - Renamed: Services
 - Description updated
 
Services:Junk
 - Renamed Services:Trash
 - Description updated
 
Services:Mailing Lists
 - Description updated
 
Services:Forums
 - Description updated

Services:Cluster Administration
 - Description updated
 
Services:Bug Tracker
 - Description updated
